chat_history.content:
Hi — I can help you plan your pharma speaker program. We’ll go through: your information, product & topic, schedule, speaker, venue, and a few final details. The intake team typically reviews submissions within one business day, and most programs need 4–6 weeks of lead time.

What’s your name?
I want to plan a program for Oncoshield — what topics can I pick?

For Oncoshield, the topic choices will be limited to the compliance-approved topics for that product. Once we continue the intake, I’ll help you choose from those approved options only.

First, what’s your name?

Eligible speakers are the ones who are currently certified to speak on the selected product. For Oncoshield, that means the list will automatically exclude anyone whose certification has expired.

Once we get to the speaker section, I can help you review and compare the compliant speaker options.

First, what’s your name?
